description: Use this API to return an array of real values for subsystem zones. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.3.0. ierr, rarray = azonereal(sid, flag, string)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the zone subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem zones to include. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the zone quantities desired. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: rarray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*DIM elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains DIM elements. (output).

sid.description: to instruct the API to assume a subsystem containing all zones in the working case.
valid zone subsystem identifier. Valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. Subsystem SID must have been previously defined.

flag.description: for only subsystem zones with at least one ac bus assigned to them.
for subsystem zones with any equipment (ac buses, loads, and/or dc buses) assigned to them.

string.description: Total active power load on buses in the zone, in MW.
Total reactive power load on buses in the zone, in Mvar.
Total active power load of loads in the zone, in MW.
Total reactive power load of loads in the zone, in Mvar.
Total active power generation on buses in the zone, in MW.
Total reactive power generation on buses in the zone, in Mvar.
Total active power losses assigned to the zone, in MW.
Total reactive power losses assigned to the zone, in Mvar.
Total active power to transformer magnetizing admittance for winding 1 buses in the zone, in MW.
Total reactive power to transformer magnetizing admittance for winding 1 buses in the zone, in MVar.
Total active power net interchange from the zone, in MW.
Total reactive power net interchange from the zone, in Mvar.
Total active power load on buses in the zone (units determined by power output option).
Total reactive power load on buses in the zone (units determined by power output option).
Total active power load of loads in the zone (units determined by power output option).
Total reactive power load of loads in the zone (units determined by power output option).
Total active power generation on buses in the zone (units determined by power output option).
Total reactive power generation on buses in the zone (units determined by power output option).
Total active power losses assigned to the zone (units determined by power output option).
Total reactive power losses assigned to the zone (units determined by power output option).
Total active power to transformer magnetizing admittance for winding 1 buses in the zone (units determined by power output option).
Total reactive power to transformer magnetizing admittance for winding 1 buses in the zone (units determined by power output option).
Total active power net interchange from the zone (units determined by power output option).
Total reactive power net interchange from the zone (units determined by power output option).

error_codes.description: DIM, and hence the size of RARRAY, is not large enough.
